run_context: Decider 2026-04-26: EXP-253 H6 forward link + EXP-254 H4 alt text fix

patches.find: or revise the criterion (and concede the prediction was never discriminating in the first place).
patches.replace: or revise the criterion (and concede the prediction was never discriminating in the first place). (A second, independent failure appears in §4.2.7: the dome’s own published parameters produce a totality zone roughly 1.3 km wide — about 1/220 the observed path of totality — via an argument that does not depend on the misstatement established here.)
patches.rationale: EXP-253 curmudgeon H6 follow-up: §4.2.7 (EXP-254) now exists; add forward cross-reference from §4.2.2 closing paragraph.

patches.find: Globe physics (Chapman-Sq mechanism) shows a smooth bell-shaped partial-eclipse curve
patches.replace: Globe physics (standard occultation geometry, NASA Besselian elements) shows a smooth bell-shaped partial-eclipse curve
patches.rationale: EXP-254 curmudgeon H4: Figure 2 alt text incorrectly labels the coverage curve as Chapman-Sq mechanism. Chapman-Sq is the ionospheric conductivity mechanism driving magnetic anomalies; the visible light obscuration curve derives from standard occultation geometry via NASA Besselian elements. Replace with accurate label.
